tagline: Whakawāteatia tō repo i ia tukunga.

hero.title: Kia ora i roto i ia reo
hero.lede: Ka whakamāoritia tēnei whārangi e te Kaiwhakamāori Rauemi, i ia pana ki te matua, ki ia reo e tautokona ana e Azure AI Translator.

phrases.welcome: Nau mai ki te Kaiwhakamāori Rauemi.
phrases.machine_translated: He mea whakamāori-mīhini e Azure AI Translator.
phrases.open_pull_request: Whakatuwheratia tētahi tono kume me ngā whakawhitinga hōu.
phrases.ship_anywhere: Tukuna ō pūmanawa ki hea i runga i te Ao.
phrases.thank_you: Tēnā koe mō tō whakamātau i te Kaiwhakamāori Rauemi.

features.fast: Ka whakamāoritia ngā rauemi i roto i ngā hēkona.
features.reliable: Ka haere-huri i ia paita o ō kōnae pūtake.
features.configurable: Oro, mahi, kupukupu, kupu whakarihariha — ka taea te whirihora katoa.
features.ci_native: I hoahoatia mō ngā Hohenga GitHub me ngā rerengamahi tono-kume.

footer.powered_by: He mea whakahiko nā te Kaiwhakamāori Rauemi me te Kaiwhakamāori Azure AI.
footer.view_translation_pr: Tirohia te tono kume takatau hōu rawa.
